# PERF-176 negative: use io.CopyBuffer with a pooled buffer
lang: go
file: PERF-176-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"io"
	"sync"
)

var bufPool = sync.Pool{
	New: func() any {
		b := make([]byte, 32*1024)
		return &b
	},
}

func DrainAll(readers []io.Reader, dst io.Writer) error {
	for _, r := range readers {
		bufPtr := bufPool.Get().(*[]byte)
		_, err := io.CopyBuffer(dst, r, *bufPtr)
		bufPool.Put(bufPtr)
		if err != nil {
			return err
		}
	}
	return nil
}
